insights.title: Business Name and Category Clarity
insights.details: The business name 'Healthy Smiles Dental Clinic' clearly indicates the dental industry. The category aligns with 'Dentist' or 'Dental Clinic,' making it understandable for both users and AI systems.

insights.title: AI-Compatible Descriptions
insights.details: The business description includes specific dental services such as teeth cleaning, orthodontics, and cosmetic dentistry, providing clear entities for better AI indexing. However, some descriptions could be more detailed with service-specific keywords.

insights.title: Sentiment of Recent Reviews
insights.details: Recent reviews show mostly positive feedback about friendly staff and clean facilities but include some complaints about wait times and appointment availability. Overall sentiment leans slightly positive but includes negative mentions.

insights.title: Entity Verification (Cross-Reference with OSM)
insights.details: No OSM data retrieved. Without cross-validation data, confidence in entity consistency is absent, increasing risk of mismatch or outdated information.

findings.title: Lack of OSM Data & Entity Cross-Validation
findings.description: No OpenStreetMap data is available to verify the entity details against the GBP. This absence prevents confidence in data consistency and completeness.
findings.impact: Limits ability to verify address accuracy, may affect local search rankings, and reduces AI recognition capabilities.
findings.fix_example: Integrate or update the location data on OSM and ensure consistent information across geospatial platforms.
